arts.ttl: Newcastle's Kelly joins Juventus on loan with £20m obligation to buy
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly joins Juventus in a loan deal with an obligation to make the move permanent for £20m in the summer.

Newcastle United took a giant leap towards the Carabao Cup final by beating Arsenal 2-0 in the first leg of their semi-final tie at the Emirates, but there's still plenty of work for the Magpies to do on Wednesday night. Eddie Howe will aim to oversee a stress-free evening bereft of drama, and here's the starting lineup he could pick for Wednesday's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg.

arts.ttl: 'Completely different': Fabrizio Romano suggests Arsenal are set to make a big signing in the summer
Lewis-Skelly decision made as £27m man drops out: Arsenal predicted XI v Newcastle
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to claw back a 2-0 deficit in their League Cup semi-final when they head to Newcastle United for their second leg on...

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe insists Newcastle will have a 'front foot' and 'aggressive' approach against Arsenal - as Magpies prepare for second leg of semi-final
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: Leading 2-0 from the first leg at the Emirates Stadium, the Magpies boss does not want his team to set out by protecting their advantage.

arts.ttl: Karim Benzema rubs salt into Mikel Arteta's wounds after Arsenal 'disappointment'
arts.sum: Arsenal were urged to make a move for Karim Benzema in the January transfer window and the former Real Madrid star has now been pictured wearing a retro Gunners shirt

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies contract decision could scupper Arsenal Jamal Musiala transfer dream
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have announced that full-back Alphonso Davies has signed a new deal with the club, and it’s something that could be a blow to Arsenal ’s transfer hopes. Speaking last month, the 21-year-old admitted that he’d be happy to play alongside Davies, and fellow teammate Leroy Sane for the next few seasons.

arts.ttl: 'Something different': Mikel Arteta hints Arsenal academy graduate could soon cover at centre-forward
arts.sum: Arsenal tried to sign a new centre-forward in the January transfer window, but to no avail. The Gunners are currently without Gabriel Jesus and Bukayo...

arts.ttl: Newcastle line up Isak replacement as Arsenal eye HUGE summer deal
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly lining up a bid for Bournemouth star Justin Kluivert if they are forced to sell Alexander Isak this summer. Although Newcastle are eager to bring Kluivert to the club this summer, Isak is reportedly expected to remain at St James’ Park if they can secure Champions League football.

arts.ttl: Arsenal bleating serves as St James' Park reminder to ease Newcastle nerves
arts.sum: When Newcastle won sensationally 2-0 in north London on January 7 it was the best result of the season and completed a stunning run of three away victories at Manchester United, Spurs and Arsenal in nine days. Either Newcastle are in grave danger of the unthinkable, losing three home games in a row, or are on the cusp of a memorable achievement, beating Arsenal three times in a season.
